channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 skydoves/compose-nav-graph (189 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: skydoves

📝 Repository: skydoves/compose-nav-graph

📄 Descrizione: ⛵️ Compose Navigation Graph plugin for Android Studio that visualizes your entire app flow as an interactive map of rendered previews, typed arguments, and transitions.

⭐ Stelle: 189

🍴 Forks: 5

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android compose compose-multiplatform jetpack-compose jetpack-navigation kmp kotlin-multiplatform navigation navigation3 skydoves

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-12T05:58:40Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-13T05:34:48Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: zenjahid

📝 Repository: zenjahid/bKash-Sync

item.title: 📝 m4xx3d0ut/1337-board (21 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: m4xx3d0ut

📝 Repository: m4xx3d0ut/1337-board

📄 Descrizione: 1337 Board is a desktop-style Android keyboard for terminals, editors, tablets, and power-user text entry. It is inspired by the practical layout ideas in Hacker's Keyboard, but implemented as a modern Android IME with current APIs, custom rendering, and privacy-focused defaults.

⭐ Stelle: 21

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

📜 Licenza: Other
